review_text: Bri es great. Super through and nice.
Went in for my first appt and would recommend to everyone! Arianna & Bri were phenomenal & we're  extremely helpful on educating me on my treatment!
Hope was super nice and professional, would 100% come back again!
Hope did a wonderful job on my hydrofacial!  Very professional!
Hope was great and we enjoyed our hydra facials!

Had my first tattoo removal appointment today with Hope. I was really nervous and she made me feel at ease and went the extra mile to make sure I was prepared and comfortable. The entire session was quick and the entire team at Laser Away was extremely kind, attentive, and helpful.
Love my LaserAway peeps.  They always look out for my skin and budget. The create great solutions.
Everyone was excellent! Very helpful and Desiree was great!!
Nurse hope is great and thorough! Excellent service!!

I had Brianna for my laser hair treatment, and she was wonderful! Very professional, easy to talk to and made sure that I was comfortable throughout the entire process. Definitely hoping to be scheduled with her again!

First Time getting laser hair removal!! Brianna is great! She made sure I was comfortable and would test spot so I would know what to expect. can’t wait to continue treatment 😁 and shout out to the front desk team!! They’re great at making you feel welcome

I agree with many posts on here and I don’t understand how there’s still a 5-star average on this place. Big time scammers hungry for money.

They also overwork their nurses. I saw sooo much staff turnover in my time there, and nurses working entire shifts by themselves repeatedly. The nurses would say they couldn’t take time off because there was nobody to cover them or they’d be coming from the other location because they were short staffed.

They once gave me a complimentary lip flip for messing up my appointment one time, and didn’t even tell me they were using that free lip flip as an opportunity for one of their new nurses to learn how to do lip flips.  It wasn’t until they were actively injecting me that they told me.

Also! Do NOT get cool sculpting! I know you’ve probably done your research and feel like this place has lots of good reviews, but DONT DO IT! Thousands of dollars down the drain and an unbelievable pain each time.  Nothing changed about my body, and that’s with regular working out, and managing what I ate accompanying my cool sculpting journey.  Somehow, it felt like cool sculpting actually kept me from losing weight as I always had in the past with exercise and proper nutrition.
It’s been almost 2 years since my last treatment, and I am finally losing weight and thought back to how badly I couldn’t lose weight during or right after finishing my treatments.  It’s as though it froze my fat to stay in place.

I’ve gotten cool sculpting, laser hair removal, clear & brilliant, hydra facials, a crooked lip flip, and semaglutide shots here. They overcharge for most of their services, but the biggest issues I had were the cool sculpting, crooked lip flip, constant errors from the schedulers, and over EVERYTHING - the salespeople. If your business is so great, you wouldn’t have to train your staff to push so hard to convince people you all are great.
I’ve been doing laser for a few years on and off and this is by far the best experience I’ve had. Big thank you to Sailom! She’s amazing
Hope took care of my laser tattoo removal was very nice!

Got a Hydrafacial with Hope today and it was wonderful. She walked me through the whole process beforehand so I knew what to expect, explained aftercare, and overall made the whole experience very pleasant. The facial itself was really relaxing and my face is glowing!

1P: Appointment
1:30P: lead to private room
1:40P technician shares she is running behind at least 10 minutes

This happened over two different appointments.  Note, I have been a client for over a year, received multiple services and given give 5/5 star views for LaserAway locations in LA and LV .

Bottom line - delays happen but the front desk was consistently inconsiderate and unkind with the delay - "we can't help when clients come in."  There are so many spas and services available at this price point.
I had Hope as my nurse for laser hair removal and she was awesome! Super quick, easy and accommodating. I truly appreciate her flexibility with me on time.

Hope was amazing. She did her thing on me with the clear and brilliance! It was spicy cause I got the texture and pore option but worth it! Also Arianna at the front went above and beyond for me. I forgot to park in the garage and she found the street parking code for me. She’s so sweet! Thank you Laser Away!

Extremely disappointed, especially considering I'm paying $4,000 in this treatment!

During my last visit 03/28/26, I had to stop my session early due to unsafe and uncomfortable conditions (the room temperature became excessively hot, and I felt unable to continue). Despite this, the session was still marked as “completed.”

I also experienced a lack of professionalism from both the technician and front desk staff, including dismissive behavior when I raised concerns and no access to management for resolution.

Additionally, there were discrepancies between the areas I requested during consultation and what was actually added to my package, and I’ve been told no adjustments can be made.

I am hoping management reviews this and reaches out to resolve the situation appropriately.
Aliza she was amazing, great at what she does! Super fast and she was really sweet and conversational. Love the results of my laser
customer service is great and patience
This clinic is fantastic, no joke. My nurse was very kind & thoroughly explained the procedure, as well as how to take care of the site afterwards. I would def recommend!
Hope is absolutely amazing as well as the front desk, Wyatt and Rue. Everyone was so helpful
Staff here are so kind and welcoming! First time doing the hydrafacial and Alyssa walked me through every step and my skin is glowing!
Hope and Adrian were absolutely amazing and incredibly kind! Definitely coming back to see them soon!
Hope and Adrian were AMAZING!! did lip, cheek and nasiolabial folds and it made such a grear difference 😭🙏🏼 natural & subtle but the improvement is noticeable!! thank you so much!!
Very nice and clean. Not too expensive. No hassle. Kate was my contact and she was wonderful.
I highly recommend this place went there for my first tattoo removal procedure. They made me feel very comfortable. The treatment was fast great staff clean environment.

Buyer beware !!!! They bug you to death of course they want payment at first then fill this form etc etc. I drive 45 minutes to get told my medical due to me having macular degeneration they would not due Botox around my mouth funny !! Never have I been denied Botox for this . I signed release papers ! This is a total get your money first then hold it for 7 to 10 days SCAM !! Funny.. I have been in the optical field for 26 yrs and currently travel to ophthalmology offices across Texas . I am pretty sure. I know a little something about my eyes !!!! waste of my time and disappointment the only thing that was amazing is the front desk 5 star costumer service !!!
Unless you want front desk costumer service
I would avoid this place like the plague !!

I had such an amazing experience at LaserAway thanks to Des and Marissa. Des, the nurse, was incredibly knowledgeable, gentle, and attentive throughout my treatment. She took the time to explain everything in detail, made sure I felt comfortable, and approached the entire process with so much care and professionalism.

Marissa, the lead, was equally fantastic. She was welcoming, organized, and clearly takes pride in ensuring every client has a great experience. Her attention to detail and commitment to excellent service truly stood out.

Together, they made the visit feel seamless, personalized, and memorable. It’s rare to find a team that combines professionalism, expertise, and such a warm, positive energy. I would absolutely recommend this location to anyone looking for high-quality care and exceptional service.
They made it painless, and happy with the results. Adrian is a rock star!
Jasmine did my lip filler today and she was so calm, made sure I was doing ok and kept the energy high. It was my first time getting filler, but she made it such an enjoyable experience.

I’ve had both laser treatments and SkinPen at LaserAway’s East Side Austin location, and every experience has been amazing. I’ve never had any issues with results, scheduling, or the nurses—the entire process is always smooth and professional. The staff is incredible, knowledgeable, and consistently make me feel comfortable and well taken care of. Thank you East Side team!

I love laser away the team here

They are always so fun and accommodating! If you’re looking into getting into some treatments I would highly recommend.
I love Adrianne(sp?) she’s very knowledgeable and takes time to explain things to you.

I have been coming to this location for a little over two years and I’m still loving it! The front desk crew are always lovely and welcoming. I see Nurse Adrian most frequently and she’s absolutely incredible. She answers any questions I have and gives me honest informative advice. I haven’t received care like I have with her so I’m grateful to the LaserAway team for maintaining a great experience.

If you don’t know what to do first, the Hydro facial is a great place to start. I was lucky enough to get tag teamed by Holly and Adrian.  Holly went deep with extractions and the red light special is divine!  At the end Holly even showed me all the dead skin & “guk” that was extracted which was so satisfying to see.

Adrian came up with a solid skincare plan for the next 6 months and Wyatt at the front desk was so helpful with packages & scheduling.
Next stop, Clear & Brilliant and adding the Korean Salmon treatment - looking forward to my face rejuvenation!
Awesome!
Wonderful injectors! These ladies made me comfortable and were kind.
I loved my 1st laser hair removal visit with Nastasia. She was sooo fun and gentle, and the visit was super quick! I can’t wait to go back
Absolutely love Nastasia. Fun to work with but incredibly professional and made me feel comfortable the entire time. I’ve seen her multiple times and hope for her every appointment. She’s fantastic.

The team at LaserAway Bucktown is amazing! I restarted laser after a long break, and I’ve really had a solid experience at this clinic. Nick and Melissa are so friendly as you arrive. I’ve been coming here for just over six months, and had treatments done by nurses Nastasia, Kasi, and Natalie. Each of the nurses have been so friendly, patient, and knowledgeable. They all made sure I was comfortable throughout each session. The results have been so great so far! I couldn’t recommend this clinic more.

I had an amazing experience today at LaserAway in Bucktown. Kasi my nurse was courteous, kind and very polite. She took very good care of me. The staff is excellent. Go to the Bucktown location for any and everything pertaining to improvement on skin, weight loss and hair removal. You won’t regret it.5 stars ⭐️
2/15/24
My second visit.Joce, Gabby and my nurse Caitlin was amazing. Courteous, kind and professional, with a smile. The best service ever.  5 stars all day! Excellent experience 🏆

From the knowledgeable consultation and booking with Nicole, to location director Nick’s friendly welcoming and fun attitude, numbing cream for my lip flip (I’ve done it without and it’s SPICY), and my RN injector, Natalie, this experience getting Botox was by far my favorite of the aesthetic studios I’ve been to! I got a lip flip, and a brow lift effect from Natalie’s expert treatment of my forehead. I treat my forehead to open my eyes, as they’re hooded and couldn’t be more excited about the results.

I will ONLY book at LaserAway Bucktown going forward, easy decision! Thanks to the whole team for making my appointment efficient, comfortable, and effective - I’m coming back for my next treatment for sure!
Excelente atención de Natalie. Es muy profesional, amable y te hace sentir cómoda en todo momento. Explica todo con claridad y trabaja con mucho cuidado. ¡La recomiendo totalmente!

Always a great experience with Natalie! She did an amazing job on my Botox & lip filler 👄 exactly how I wanted. She took her time, explained the process, and made me feel really comfortable the whole appointment. You can tell she truly cares about her work and her clients. I’m so happy with my results and will definitely be coming back. Highly recommend!
They are so kind and respectful, Nastasia really take care of me . Thank you I recommend this place. I’m removing my facial hair
Had such a great experience with Nurse Nastasia. She super professional and makes the whole process easy. Highly recommend

Great laseraway location, everyone was very nice. Susy, the nurse, was great and super efficient! I just moved to Chicago and she was very welcoming and suggested some stuff to do in the city. Glad to come here for the rest of my sessions.

I’ve been going to the Bucktown LazerAway for years now and I always enjoy Natalie as my clinician. She has so much energy and makes me feel supported with my treatments. I would recommend asking for her when you step inside 😊

I get laser hair removal with Kasi and she is an absolute dream! She has such a warm, friendly energy! She explains everything clearly and she ensures you are comfortable throughout the entire process. She makes the appointment so calm and easy that it almost feels like a spa treatment (no joke, she makes it so relaxing)! LaserAway is an amazing establishment, and I highly recommend them and Kasi!
I went in on Sunday, I was. Services my nurse Kasi  she was amazing and very gentle!
Natalie is amazing and super knowledgable

Natalie was an amazing an nurse, she was very attentive and explained everything in great detail. Everyone at this location was very friendly, informative, and made the whole process easy and comfortable.
Great clinic. Friendly staff.  Natalie was really friendly and fast.

I love laser away and Natalie does such a great job giving me the exact results I want to with my Botox! I love a little brow lift, a lip flip and being able to move just a bit and she knocks it out of the park.
Kasi is so sweet!!

Susy did my hydra facial! She was exceptional and very educated on what would help my skin in the future. Also very considerate of my sensitive skin and concerns around the facial. I’d highly recommend!!
Had my 3rd appt and per usual staff was welcoming , professional and helpful. Natalie was a sweetheart she answered all my questions and then some. Highly recommend Laser away!!

Natalie was great from start to finish. She was really thorough in explaining each step of the hydrafacial and made sure I was comfortable the whole time. I appreciated that she took a thoughtful, individualized approach rather than rushing through it. She answered all of my questions, adjusted things as needed, and made the experience feel easy and relaxed.

My skin looked noticeably brighter and more hydrated right after, and overall it just felt like a very well-executed treatment. She has a calm, approachable bedside manner that makes a difference!

Had Natalie for my treatment yesterday. Personable and did a great job even though the laser is kind of unpleasant 😂 beauty is pain. She’s really good at pain distraction techniques and explaining things too.
I love my nurse Natalie  she was amazing walk me through process for all my treatments did not feel a thing took her time! Will be back soon!! 🫶🏼

Love Laseraway and everyone at the Bucktown location! The space is clean and well maintained, everyone at the front desk is lovely and informative, and every provider I’ve seen over the past few years is knowledgeable, professional, and efficient.

This last time I saw Kasi and I really appreciated her bedside manner and vibe! She gave me good information and explanations. Thanks!
Susy was an excellent technician for laser hair removal. She explained everything upfront, was very attentive and communicative. Looking forward to having her again.
I Went to get the clear and brilliant treatment, Nastasia was really nice and walked me through the process really well! Other staff was really friendly as well can’t wait to go back:)
I I love going there   all of u   there are so very nice and so friendly  and helpful all my questions  were happily answered   great results

I have left a review years ago when I did facial hair removal for a year but I thought I would leave another one! I saw the technician Kasi yesterday for maintenance and she was outstanding!! I trust everyone there but she was different! She walked me through everything and took the time to answer my questions! Everyone there has been great but the only word I could think of when she was working on me was EXCEPTIONAL. I would trust her to perform any service on me because I could tell she genuinely cared. I have to also give a shout out to the Coordinator Kristin!! She was so warm and inviting when I came in and offered me coffee and to go ahead and get comfortable in the room. That made me feel great because I had a head start! She was very accommodating when rebooking and overall made my experience better than ever. Thank you ladies for caring and your kindness. I look forward to seeing you all again!
I always leave here feeling amazing! The staff are so attentive and generous. Natalie always does an incredible job
Natalie at bucktown makes laser hair removal quick and easy! She takes time after to explain proper after care and is very knowledgeable.

Susy was amazing.,  professional, friendly, and very knowledgeable. She shared helpful information about the incredible products and treatments that LaserAway offers. During my microneedling session, she made sure I was comfortable and pain-free the entire time. I will definitely be returning very soon!
Everyone at the bucktown location was awesome! Especially my nurse natalie!!!
Nastasia did such a great job to make me feel comfortable for my services! She is personable, kind, and upbeat. Would definitely go to her again for future laser hair removal or botox!

Love coming to Laseraway! Susy was amazing! She ensured I felt comfortable throughout the whole process but especially during the treatment. I’m already looking forward to my next appointment at Laseraway!

I had Thermage and Botox treatments with Natalie. She is awesome! Super friendly, knowledgeable, and professional. She is the only person I now see at this location. Also, Melissa at the front desk rocks! She contributes to such a friendly and personable environment.

Natalie was incredibly kind and patient during my visit. We managed to do a hydrafacial, laser tattoo removal, and almost full-body laser hair removal all in one day, and she made the whole experience comfortable and smooth. She was professional, attentive, and really took her time to make sure everything went well!!

My only concern has been with scheduling. On TWO occasions my appointment had to be cancelled or rescheduled last minute because equipment was broken. One of those times I only found out when I arrived and checked in, even though I was told they had tried calling me - they never did. The staff did give me a courtesy for next time, which I appreciated, but it was still a bit inconvenient.

Overall, Nurse Natalie herself was wonderful, and I hope the clinic can improve communication around last-minute changes.
I Love Kasi! She’s very engaging and lovely to talk to.

Natasia, the nurse practitioner at LaserAway Bucktown, was amazing. She was super knowledgeable, explained everything clearly, and made me feel really comfortable throughout the whole appointment. You can tell she genuinely cares about her patients and their results. I had a great experience and would definitely recommend seeing her!
Nastasia is great! Makes my laser feel quick and painless

Natalie at LaserAway is the best! She has awesome customer service skills and is very knowledgeable. She makes you very comfortable and explain everything to you and makes sure you are comfortable.I definitely recommend.The staff makes you feel at home from the moment you walk in.
Great experience with Nurses Nastasia & Natalie
Full review is pending base on the resolution of my refund
Nastasia is super friendly and makes you feel extremely comfortable
I love it here... the staff is amazing... Nurse Nastasia is wonderful... she makes the entire experience worthwhile.
Kristen was great! She prepared my skin for my clear and brilliant facial. It was so fun talking to her! Perfect start to my day
For my first Laser treatment, Amaya and Liz were amazing!! They explained the whole process and gave me amazing feedback afterwards!! 10/10 Recommend!!
Easy and quick I loved the whole experience.
Amazing team. I’ve been going here for 2 years. No wait times, quick easy in an out.
Everyone was so cooperative. Michele helped me with all the process. The procedure wasn’t painful at all.

Liz was amazing! She was so knowledgeable and answered all of my questions without rushing me. I felt understood and taken care of which is what made me sign up here. Makenna did my service and she too was very knowledgeable and helpful she made sure I had no other questions or concerns after I asked a thousand questions 🤭. Thank you ladies for making my first time a good time!
Great service everybody is super nice and friendly love it here!!
Amazing service, fast and efficient, explained everything clearly and concise.
Great experience, always helpful with pricing! Liz is amazing!

My only regret is not starting sooner. After years of struggling with severe razor burn, ingrown hairs, and "strawberry legs" that resisted every traditional hair removal method, my physician recommended laser treatment. Following thorough research, I chose LaserAway.
The experience was seamless from the start. The initial consultation was informative, and the team provided a flexible payment plan that made the procedure truly affordable. The facility is clean, easy to find, and offers a welcoming, high-end atmosphere.
I cannot thank my nurse, Ms. T, enough. She was professional and incredibly friendly, ensuring I was comfortable throughout the appointment. I was shocked by how painless the process was; in fact, the environment was so calming that I nearly dozed off.
Thank you, Ms. T and LaserAway, for a transformative and professional experience!
Liz is super friendly and helped me with any questions I had!
Kasey is the best and very helpful getting me setup for my cool sculpting setup.
Bre  and Michelle were fantastic and professional.

I really enjoyed my cool sculpting experience at Laser away. I definitely see the result i wanted,  stubborn fat removed!!! From the moment you walk in the staff is very warm, welcoming, nice, and informative. From the front desk lady to the registered  nurse who conducted the process , I felt well taken care of and accommodated while getting my treatment done.
Loved the experience! My first hydro facial and I will definitely be back! Nurse Amaya was very helpful and explained the entire process. Liz from the front desk was very friendly and helpful!
Liz and Amiyah were amazing. Loved my session there, they’re so helpful and polite

Michelle was awesome. She was very nice and super professional. Amaya was awesome as well and when I did work with Bre, she was fabulous too. Y’all have a great team and I am so excited to work with them.
Kasey is incredible. She is kind, informative, and brings positive vibes to the table. Highly recommend!
Great staff. Liz is amazing!
Great service. I was in and out fast.
The experience has been great and Liz was very friendly and helpful with any and every questions I could think of.
Liz is so nice and sweet ! Very friendly and good experience!

I love coming to Laseraway at the Galleria. Liz at the front desk is welcoming and always nice to talk to. I don’t feel like just a customer it feels like family. It was quick and easy appointment as always!
Kelsey and Briana are awesome!
Casey was very helpful
Very friendly nurses and front desk lady’s. Love coming to laser away.

I've been coming here for a long time (since early 2023) for both hair and tattoo removal and I've loved it! Kasey and everyone at the front desk is super nice and welcoming and I've felt super comfortable and at ease with every nurse that's worked on me. They often have sales and it's a great bang for your buck. Would recommend!
Very kind and professional staff, amazing results!

It was incredible.

KC was great!!
ive had great experience with them for iver 2 yrs now Brianna and Michelle were great!
My first time at this location everything was great! Kasey made me so comfortable as soon as I walked in the door. They all made the laser hair removal experience so easy!

Had a great experience. It’s been a while since I’ve been back to this location and started my laser tattoo removal journey but the new faces - Michelle and my nurse Brianna were great communicators and answered all my questions. I’ll be back for more sessions soon!
Kasey and Vanessa were amazing ! So glad I started my beauty journey here at this location. I recommend to everyone , amazing customer service .
It works!

I come here for full body laser and CoolSculpting and I can say I’m very impressed and pleased with the services! Everyone is so nice and I can see a difference in my body from just one treatment. Liz is amazing and offers great customer service. 10/10 recommend!

Michelle, and Amaya were wonderful today! They got me back on track with my maintenance and freebies that I've been missing out on. Now I'm scheduled for my clear and brilliance and 6 week maintenance for my Brazilian and underarms
I been loving my laser hair treatment at laseraway! I recommend for any one looking to get it done !
Liz was amazing she walked me through step by step recommend this location 10/10 hands down all the ladies were amazing very nice
Amaya did so good with my laser! & kasey checked me in and out to make it a smooth process !!!
Amazing- highly recommend- super professional, kind, and you will see results!
Liz was awesome and very kind, and nurse amaya made sure my experience was quick and painless!!!

I’ve been going for tattoo removal and the staff is great. Amaya, one of their nurses, is polite and quick. I chose Laser Away because they’re one of the few tattoo removal companies around who staff nurses rather than just cosmetologists, which makes me feel more comfortable with the procedure. The treatments hurt a little but they offer numbing. I can’t wait to finish my sessions and have these tattoos gone! They’re already significantly faded after 8 sessions.
Michelle was very nice and the NP was very sweet.
Liz helped me having a good clarity on the procedures!!
Great place very quick with such amazing friendly staff. Especially Ms. Kasey 💗
I have been coming to this location for years. The ladies up front are great!  Kasey is always professional. She is also knowledgeable about all of the services available.
Highly recommend LaserAway. Kasey is so wonderful and nurse Amaya is so amazing. I feel very well educated and heard during my sessions.
Liz! Had an amazing service done today . Loved it !!
The service here was amazing. Michelle is such a sweetheart and helped answer all my questions and needs. Definitely recommend this location!
LaserAway was a wonderful experience.  I had my upper lip, under arms, and full Brazilian.  Could not be happier, and friendly staff all the way around.
I had an overall great experience. The whole staff was very nice and made me feel very comfortable. I look forward to my next treatment!
Staff always amazing & friendly. Manager very welcoming and is very knowledgable  in this industry. Maria the nurse ...outstanding!

Go there if you want to WASTE YOUR TIME. Because they will cancel your appointment last minute and guess what, not even let you know, on a Sunday three girls on the desk and not one of them called or texted me to let me know that for the second time in a row my appointment got canceled last minute, and I showed up to again waste my time.

The team at LaserAway is truly top notch. I’ve been going there for my central brow, and every visit has been a great experience. They remember me by name, are always incredibly welcoming, and bring such a positive, upbeat energy that really elevates the whole appointment. You can tell they genuinely care about their clients and the quality of their work. Highly recommend!
just got my lips done at laseraway, i literally can not give this place enough stars! everyone is so nice and attentive. thank you!! ☺️☺️
Great customer service and knowledgeable staff! So far I’ve only had one session which overall was minimally painful. I’m very excited to continue my sessions and start seeing results!
Amazing service!! The staff is great l, loved every service..
Blossom and Brittany were so great for my lip filler appointment. So professional and made me feel incredibly comfortable throughout. Highly recommend!
Had a great experience with Jannette she did such a great job doing my Botox and the rest of the staff were so professional! Would recommend and come back!

I recently had an amazing experience at LaserAway Tampa and wanted to share how great everything was—especially because of Jannette and Kris.

From the moment I walked in, the environment felt clean, modern, and welcoming. Jannette was incredibly kind and made me feel comfortable right away. She took the time to really listen to what I wanted, answered all my questions, and made sure I understood the process before getting started.

Kris was just as wonderful—professional, knowledgeable, and very reassuring throughout the appointment. I was a little nervous about getting Juvéderm filler in my lips and smile lines, but both of them made the experience so smooth and stress-free. They checked in with me the whole time and made sure I was comfortable.

The results are exactly what I was hoping for—natural, balanced, and refreshed. My lips look fuller without being overdone, and my smile lines are noticeably softer. I couldn’t be happier with how everything turned out.

Overall, Jannette and Kris made this such a positive experience, and I would absolutely recommend LaserAway Tampa to anyone considering fillers. I’ll definitely be coming back!
Great experience! Staff was super friendly and I received a lot of great info from the location director, Grace. I will be back!
Friendly, competent, and affordable especially when they have specials
The place is 100 % clean, exceptional customer service. Parking lot availables behind the building.
Chris is a great nurse practitioner. She was kind and gentle from start to finish.

LoVe lOvE LoOvE this place

Free consultation....

Casey Mirage approvaL
Thermage

Best decision I’ve ever made…! The Tampa location was amazing everyone there is so nice and I left there educated on what to expect during the process. I’ll definitely keep coming back! Thank you ladies!
I love the personal experience they are so good and kind and helpful girls 🥰
Great experience for clear and brilliant and scalp micro needling for hair growth.

Don't do your laser hair removal at this place. They convince you you'll see certain results but then when you tell them after the sessions they are they tell you to buy more to keep going which is a scam. I got my 8 sessions and the provider suggested I still needed 8 more for the results THEY PROMISED but they are like you have to buy them. I already spent 8k on the full body package and they still expect me to buy more so I suggest you stay away from this place. I have called customer service and emailed them and they have been zero help and are also mean. No one wants to help they just want you to buy the treatments and when you need assistance they are nowhere to be found.

Yesterday was my first visit to LaserAway in Tampa for a package of Clear + Brilliant treatments I purchased. Fernanda at the front desk was so kind and welcoming. She brought me back to the treatment room and helped me settle in. There was some sort of scheduling issue so I was waiting a long time past my appointment time but they made up for it with sincere apologies and a complimentary treatment added to my account.  Ashley did my treatment and she thoroughly went over everything about the procedure and answered all my questions. I can’t wait to go back in a few weeks for my next session!

I had the BEST experience at LaserAway! From the moment I walked in, the entire team made me feel so welcome and comfortable. Lindsey, Jannette, Kris, Grace, Fernanda and Ashley are absolutely amazing  so professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely kind. They truly go above and beyond to make sure you feel confident and taken care of.They’re honestly the stars of the show! The service was smooth, the atmosphere was beautiful, and everything was explained clearly so I felt completely at ease. You can tell they really care about their clients and love what they do. I would 100% recommend LaserAway to anyone thinking about booking. Such a gorgeous place with an even more gorgeous team! Definitely coming back! Love everyone💖!

Was so pleased with my past few laser appts here! The staff and atmosphere are extremely sweet and beautiful! I’ve seen the best results and only have had a few services so far. Thank you to all the girls at Tampa laser away! I appreciate all you do 🩷🩷

I had to leave a review before even starting my treatments because the experience alone deserves it.

I recently went to a consultation at another laser hair removal clinic and left feeling overwhelmed and pressured. I was asked to apply for financing before I had even seen clear pricing, and I ended up signing up for a package that same day without having the time to truly think it through or discuss it with my boyfriend. It was a significant amount of money, and it did not even cover all the areas I originally wanted treated. The entire experience felt rushed, and I walked away feeling more like a number than a person.

Out of curiosity, I began researching other clinics and that is when I connected with Jessica at LaserAway. From our very first conversation, I was a little reserved because of what I had just experienced elsewhere. Jessica immediately picked up on that. Instead of pushing me, she created space for me to ask questions. When I brought up pricing, she was completely transparent. She explained the costs clearly without requiring me to book on the spot or apply for financing first. That alone was such a relief.

I opened up to her about my previous consultation and how pressured I had felt. She listened. She did not interrupt, rush me, or try to override my concerns. She even encouraged me to take time to talk things over with my boyfriend before moving forward. She scheduled my consultation a few days out specifically so I could think it through comfortably. That level of respect and patience meant everything to me.

The difference between my first experience and my experience with Jessica was truly night and day. With Jessica, I felt heard, informed, and valued. I felt like a person making a thoughtful decision, not a sales target. Because of that alone, I am confident in moving forward with LaserAway.

Five stars for Jessica for her transparency, professionalism, and genuine care. She completely changed what could have been a stressful decision into an empowering one.

I’m extremely disappointed with my experience here. I was charged approximately $4,500 for 1 CoolSculpting, 1 Thermage, and 1 Clear + Brilliant treatment, and after six months, I have seen no results.

What’s even more frustrating is the lack of communication and accountability. Every time I go into the office, I tell them the charges don’t add up and ask for clarification. I’m always told someone will call me back — and no one ever does. This has been going on for months.

For a practice charging premium prices, the follow-up, transparency, and results are simply not there. This experience has been a waste of both my time and money. I would strongly advise others to ask for a detailed breakdown of costs and realistic expectations before committing.
Grace, Jenna and  all the girls upfront were so helpful and friendly! The girl that did my treatment was great as well, very knowledgeable and helpful with post-treatment care.  10/10!
Maravilloso trato, hermosas areas, relajante.

I have been working with Jenna and I can’t say enough about wonderful she is! Supportive, enthusiastic, polite and accommodating are just a few of her attributes. I am very fortunate to have her as my rep!!

After an eternity of giving LaserAway the benefit of the doubt, I am undoubtedly convinced that you should NEVER go there. ESPECIALLY The Tampa Heights location. At the beginning of my treatment, before I even started, I was promised that although there are always a few fluctuations in hormones or that “everyone’s hair is different “ I should still expect to see results WITHIN the treatments I got and be completely hairless. That was completely false and only the start of their false advertising. Later on I was told during an appointment already HALFWAY through treatment that everyone’s body is different so the treatment may need to be extended and I may have to additionally purchase treatments. Not only did I leave that day regretting ever even having done this treatment with LaserAway but it changed everything because the ONLY reason I signed up for this in the first place was because they were offering a supposed “Limited time only Christmas sale” for 70% Off which sounded great and I had always wanted to get laser treatment. Little did I know they run this “limited time only” sale for every event and as a matter of fact are running it right now for their 20th anniversary sale for 70% off!! Had I known to look further into the company, they are facing multiple Lawsuits for every issue I have experienced. I want my money back and at this point I don’t even know if I want the treatments anymore. Not to mention the fact that my treatments have barely worked and I credit it to everytime my appointment would get pushed back or I would get told that it was MY fault that I double booked my appointment since it was on the app so they would have to reschedule me for weeks in advance!! Ridiculous. I was originally quoted around $2600 and since then I have been tricked into paying way more due to being upsold on more treatments after being told I was only going to need the 8. So disappointed and at this point I want to seek legal advice or some type of major compensation. I have had so many issues from the start with this company, financially, treatment wise, even having to hear that the reason they can’t get me in is because they didn’t even have enough staff for me when I had made the appointment weeks ago. They marketing is so false and they are so pushy when selling you, and it was so intimidating and frustrating having to go into the store for my appointment knowing I was unhappy but didn’t want to say anything so my treatment wouldn’t get affected. Which still is nowhere near where I wanted or expected after a year of treatment. I’ll update my review based on the companies response.
The people are awesome. The atmosphere is amazing. They are very informative.

The amazing ladies at LaserAway are truly wonderful! Grace and the entire team are so kind, professional, and welcoming. They always make me feel comfortable and cared for. I’m loving the progress I’m seeing on my laser removal treatments! Highly recommend!

Very professional and friendly atmosphere.   The place is very clean and well kept.  All needs and concerns were thoroughly taken care of.   I am having a tattoo removed and this was my second appointment.  Would highly recommend the services  provided here at this business.

I scheduled and paid in full upfront, because the won’t schedule you unless you pay in full upfront.
Then I reserved a call on the same day of my service to reschedule me, I was pushed back two weeks, then again I received a call on the day of my services to reschedule again. I took a day off for it and the just canceled my appointment.
They have a 24 hour cancellation policy, that means if I called on the same day to cancel or reschedule I would’ve lost my money I have paid upfront, but for them to cancel and reschedule the rule is not applicable.
I have asked them for a full refund, and the tried to reschedule me again instead of a full refund, foul me once on you foul me twice one me, so I am not failing for it, it was difficult to get my refund but I didn’t trust them anymore.

Writing this review after spending over $5,000 on laser hair removal after 8 sessions body / 10 face + 4 ADDITIONAL sessions bought because "everyone is different and it might take more sessions". PLEASE do not come here, the lasers they use are a scam, their sales tactics are a scam, nothing here has worked and I have seen many others in similar situations. My hair is still growing at the same rate and thickness as it was prior to my 12 sessions! They try to gas light me into saying its "me and my hormones" and don't take any responsibility.  You would think after spending so much money you would see SOME sort of results but nope! Hair is still growing at the same rate it was. On top of this you CANNOT get in with the availability pushed so far out that I cant get in every 6 weeks if I tried or wanted to. This is with booking in advance weeks prior. I've had multiple appointments cancelled on me due to scheduling or lasers not working, as well as moving my appointment time with out telling me. The front desk associates are extremely rude and off putting any time you call with questions or wanting to schedule. I've never experienced such terrible service, gas lighting, insincerity, fakeness after spending so much money on something before. Please take my review and run :)
Chris was very thorough with my tattoo removal and everyone up front was very kind and on top of everything. If anyone needed a tattoo removal I would recommend Laseraway

I’m really disappointed with my experience. I paid $2,000 for eight sessions after being told I was getting a big discount, but I later found out my friend’s spa charges only $150 per session for the same areas—less than half the price and with the same high-end top-market machines. On top of that, the results were minimal and not worth what I paid. The only positive was the friendly customer service, but overall I feel misled and overcharged. I wouldn’t recommend. You’re better off going to Milan Laser. At least there you’ll for sure get all the treatments you need since it’s unlimited

So I got the special they were running which was a great deal but still not cheap , I got 8 sessions on my underarms and Brazilian . Arms a little bit of a difference but Brazilian not at all ! Was told I would see a 50-70% hair loss and am so not happy with the results . Will go somewhere else and try it all over again soooo sad .

Honestly the best group of women - shoutout to every front desk personnel. So kind, courteous, professional - and will do absolutely anything to ensure you are happy with your service. I had Maria for my hydrafacial and she was detail oriented and made sure my face was perfect before I left. If I could leave 10 stars I would. Run don’t walk and book today!
Love Jazz ❤️

They have a 70% off Laser Removal promo and when you go to their website to see pricing the whole process is just so scammy they keep leading you on like you’re about to get pricing and when you make an appointment for consultation it always says failed to make appointment so the only option is to consult with them right then and there, it’s very clear they want your business immediately, but that’s not the worst part.
When I got in the phone for the consultation the lady was very nice but just a salesperson of course, she told me it was the last day for their promo when I know that promo has been up there for a while, so just a marketing lie. Then when I told her I won’t be around for the full year of treatments but I was just tying to gather info she turned cold and clearly did not want to speak with me anymore. All I asked her after was if she recommends shaving before a first treatment and if numbing cream is used but she kept trying to cut off the conversation and she hung up with a very curt “bye” and straight to dial tone.
Just another lying money hungry business with unfriendly people. Take your money elsewhere for kinder people

It has been over 3 months since my first session and 2 months since my second session, I do not see any changes even if minimal. I do think if it works at all, the price is too high for the actual results.

I got lip filler and I am just obsessed! They kept it looking natural, it barely hurt and they were all so sweet and professional. Janette, Maria and Alyssa were so sweet and did such a great job. Lindsey at the front desk was always helpful. Thank you girls!

I am SO glad I chose LaserAway for my Xeomin treatment! The girls Lindsey and Grace are so knowledgeable, helpful and were eager to help me find the best prices on future treatments. I honestly am wanting to come back because of the quality and precision of my Master Injector and the great customer service and deals! If youre looking for the best prices in Tampa I would absolutwly reccomend LaserAway in Tampa Heights. Theyre having a 20% off special for Halloween rn too.
